data.title: Bain: Agentic AI could account for 25% of U.S. ecommerce by 2030
data.description: The firm cites Salesforce figures estimating that AI and autonomous agents influenced about $3 billion in U.S. Black Friday sales, signaling early commercial impact even as most purchases remain consumer directed.

data.title: Fastenal names new CEO, signals continuity in ecommerce
data.description: The leadership change comes as Fastenal continues to emphasize customer-facing technology, inventory management systems and digitally enabled supply chain services.

data.title: DoorDash rolls out app in OpenAI's ChatGPT
data.description: For now, the ChatGPT experience is limited to groceries and select users, DoorDash said, with broader access planned over time.

data.title: Stord plans for $40 million Kentucky expansion
data.description: Stord entered the Hebron market in 2024 through its acquisition of Pitney Bowes’ ecommerce fulfillment business, which included a 520,000-square-foot facility.

data.title: Cars Commerce names a new CEO
data.description: Tobias Hartmann most recently served as CEO and chairman of the management board of Scout24 SE Group.
